summary: Tested location filtering feature for Browse Spots Manually. Backend API endpoints working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend booking flow has UI state management issue preventing navigation to step 2 (location picker).

ui_bugs.issue: Continue button remains disabled after selecting session type, date, and time. Unable to proceed to step 2 (location picker) to test the new Browse Spots Manually feature.

integration_issues.flow: Booking flow step 1 to step 2 navigation
integration_issues.issue: Cannot navigate from time selection (step 1) to location selection (step 2). The Continue button stays disabled even after making all required selections.

action_items: Fix the booking drawer Continue button state management - it should enable after selecting session type, date, and time
Verify the canProceedFromTime validation logic in ScheduledBookingDrawer.js (line ~1551)
Test the Browse Spots Manually feature once the booking flow navigation is fixed
critical_code_review_comments: The ImpactZonePicker component (lines 46-864) has the location picker UI implemented correctly with country/state dropdowns
Backend /api/surf-spots/locations endpoint returns 71 countries with states - working correctly
Backend /api/surf-spots with state_province parameter filters correctly - USA has 429 spots, Florida has 119 spots
The booking flow step navigation may have a validation issue - canProceedFromTime requires selectedDate, selectedTime, selectedDuration, and selectedCategory to all be truthy

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully test - blocked by booking flow navigation issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend location filtering APIs are working correctly. The frontend ImpactZonePicker component has the Browse Spots Manually UI with country/state dropdowns implemented. However, the booking flow has a navigation issue - the Continue button on step 1 (time selection) remains disabled, preventing access to step 2 (location picker) where the Browse Spots Manually feature is located. The main agent should check the canProceedFromTime validation logic.

backend_locations_endpoint.details: /api/surf-spots/locations returns 71 countries with states/provinces and spot counts

frontend_browse_spots_button.details: Cannot reach step 2 of booking flow due to Continue button being disabled

frontend_country_dropdown.details: Cannot reach step 2 of booking flow

frontend_state_dropdown.details: Cannot reach step 2 of booking flow

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The canProceedFromTime validation (line ~1551) requires selectedDate, selectedTime, selectedDuration, AND selectedCategory to all be truthy. When clicking on session types and dates in the UI, the state may not be updating correctly.
reproduction_steps: 2. Go to Explore, search for 'David Pritzker'
6. Select a session type (e.g., Morning Session)
7. Select a date from the calendar
rca_of_the_issue.potential_fix: Check if the onClick handlers for session type, date, and time are properly updating the state variables (selectedCategory, selectedDate, selectedTime)
